data.title: Enertopia Secures Patent for Water-Producing System
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An announcement from Enertopia ( (ENRTD) ) is now available.

On February 18, 2025, Enertopia announced the issuance of a patent for its ‘ENERTOPIA RAINMAKER’ water-producing system by the United States Patent Trademark Office. This system captures atmospheric moisture to produce water, potentially offering a sustainable solution for arid regions where desalination is costly and energy-intensive. The system can be integrated with solar arrays to enhance the return on investment by producing water at night or during favorable conditions. This innovation could provide a cost-effective alternative to traditional desalination plants, which require significant capital and energy, thus addressing water scarcity in various parts of the world.

More about Enertopia

Enertopia Corporation is an energy solutions company focused on building shareholder value through intellectual property patents in green technologies, particularly in the energy sector, and also holds lithium claims in Nevada. Its shares are quoted in the United States and Canada under the ticker symbol ENRT.

YTD Price Performance: -43.43%

Average Trading Volume: 4,696

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $437K

data.title: Jumbo Group Ltd. Convenes Tenth Annual General Meeting
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An announcement from Jumbo Group Ltd. (Singapore) ( (SG:42R) ) is now available.

Jumbo Group Ltd., a Singaporean company, held its tenth Annual General Meeting (AGM), chaired by Mr. Tan Cher Liang, on January 24, 2025. The meeting was conducted in accordance with the Catalist Rules, and all resolutions were decided by a poll. Boardroom Corporate & Advisory Services Pte Ltd and Reliance 3P Advisory Pte Ltd were appointed as the polling agent and scrutineer, respectively. A video was shown to shareholders explaining the voting process, and the Group CEO, Mr. Ang Kiam Meng, addressed the shareholders.

data.title: Avalon GloboCare Secures Patent for CAR-T Technology
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest update is out from Avalon GloboCare ( (ALBT) ).

On February 18, 2025, Avalon GloboCare Corp. announced it received a Notice of Allowance from the China National Intellectual Property Administration for its patent application AVAR1901CN. This patent, co-developed with Arbele Limited, is a significant milestone in CAR-T and CAR-NK cell technology, enhancing Avalon’s global intellectual property footprint. The patented technology’s key features include a bispecific anti-CD19xCD22 CAR, which targets both CD19 and CD22 antigens, reducing the risk of tumor escape due to antigen loss, and localized cytokine induction to improve CAR cell efficacy. This development strengthens Avalon’s position in the global market and aims to improve accessibility and outcomes for patients worldwide.

More about Avalon GloboCare

Avalon GloboCare Corp. is a commercial stage company focused on developing and delivering innovative precision diagnostics and clinical laboratory services. The company provides a wide range of diagnostic tests, including drug testing, toxicology, general bloodwork, anatomic pathology, and urine toxicology, utilizing proprietary technology to deliver precise, genetics-driven results.

YTD Price Performance: 7.58%

Average Trading Volume: 906,684

data.title: Industrie De Nora’s 2024 Financial Performance Surpasses Expectations with Strong Segment Growth
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Industrie De Nora SpA ( (IT:DNR) ) has provided an announcement.

Industrie De Nora S.p.A. reported preliminary financial results for 2024 with a revenue increase of 2.6% at constant exchange rates and an adjusted EBITDA margin surpassing expectations at 18.2%, reflecting strong performances across its business segments. The company experienced substantial growth in its Water Technologies and Energy Transition segments, with revenues rising notably in the fourth quarter, driven by effective execution of backlog orders. This financial strength supports De Nora’s ongoing investment in R&D and production optimization, aiming to bolster its competitive edge and pursue growth strategies.

More about Industrie De Nora SpA

Industrie De Nora S.p.A. is an Italian multinational listed on Euronext Milan, specializing in electrochemistry and recognized for leading in the development of sustainable technologies.

data.title: Dominari Holdings Announces New Venture with Trump Jr.
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An update from Dominari Holdings ( (DOMH) ) is now available.

On February 18, 2025, Dominari Holdings announced the creation of American Data Centers Inc. (ADC), a venture with Donald J. Trump Jr., Eric Trump, and AI industry professionals, aimed at developing data center campuses across the U.S. to meet growing demand for computing infrastructure. ADC, in which Dominari holds a 32% stake, is expected to significantly enhance the U.S. AI infrastructure. Additionally, Dominari declared a special cash dividend of $0.32 per share, totaling approximately $4.6 million, to be paid on March 3, 2025, reflecting its financial growth and commitment to shareholder value.

More about Dominari Holdings

Dominari Holdings Inc. is a holding company involved in wealth management, investment banking, sales and trading, and asset management. The company provides management support to its subsidiaries and seeks opportunities to enhance stockholder value, including in the AI and data center sectors.

data.description:

  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An announcement from Aoxin Q&M Dental Group Ltd. ( (SG:1D4) ) is now available.

Aoxin Q & M Dental Group Ltd. announced that it will convene an extraordinary general meeting (EGM) by 16 April 2025, following a requisition notice from Q & M Dental Group (Singapore) Limited. The primary agenda of this meeting is to vote on a resolution to remove Dr. Ong Siew Hwa as an Executive Director. This development could signify potential changes in the company’s leadership structure, which might impact its operations and strategic direction.

More about Aoxin Q&M Dental Group Ltd.

Aoxin Q & M Dental Group Ltd. operates in the dental industry, providing dental services and possibly related products. The company is based in Singapore and works alongside its subsidiaries.

data.title: Capital Group Increases Stake in AstraZeneca
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

AstraZeneca ( (GB:AZN) ) has shared an update.

The Capital Group Companies, Inc., a major investment management company based in Los Angeles, has acquired a significant stake in AstraZeneca PLC, crossing a 5% threshold of voting rights on January 29, 2025. This acquisition highlights Capital Group’s strategic interest in AstraZeneca’s operations, potentially influencing the company’s future governance and strategic decisions.

More about AstraZeneca

AstraZeneca is a UK-based global pharmaceutical company that focuses on the discovery, development, and commercialization of prescription medicines, primarily for the treatment of diseases in areas such as oncology, cardiovascular, renal, and metabolism, as well as respiratory and immunology.
